onboarding: This app runs fully on your machine.
Before Session decoding, we need your personal Stage 1 model.
Follow calibration to upload raw EDF files, then train your profile.
calibration_steps: Sit still and reduce movement artifacts.
Follow each sentence prompt exactly in order.
For each word event, wait during rest and stimulus, then imagine during the imagination phase.
Upload the raw EDF files after recording.
session_notes: Session mode supports the bundled demo case or custom EDF upload.
Live EEG streaming is not enabled in v1.
Prediction uses fixed Diff-E with deterministic retrieval and optional local Qwen refinement.
